opinion.h: CROATAN BOOKS INC. v. VIRGINIA , 454 U.S. 999 (1981)
CROATAN BOOKS, INC., Petitioner v. VIRGINIA No. 80-2194
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the Circuit Court of Fairfax County, Virginia.
Justice BRENNAN and Justice MARSHALL would grant the petition for certiorari and reverse the conviction.[ Croatan Books Inc. v. Virginia 454 U.S. 999 (1981) ]
